5b1642a0-2176-4b6d-a2da-9788c0e7b76b.transcript:
રોહન: હેલો જય, આપણે જે દુકાનના રિનોવેશન વિશે વાત કરી હતી, એ કામ શરૂ કરવાનું છે.
જય: હા, હું તૈયાર છું. હું કામ કરી દઈશ.
રોહન: સારું. હું થોડા પૈસા આજે આપી દઈશ અને બાકી પછી આપી દઈશ.
જય: ઠીક છે.
રોહન: કામ જલ્દી પૂરું થઈ જવું જોઈએ.
જય: હું પ્રયત્ન કરીશ.
રોહન: જો કામમાં મોડું થાય તો પછી વાત કરીશું.
જય: બરાબર.
રોહન: આપણે આજે આ વાત પર સંમત છીએ.
જય: હા, હું પણ સંમત છું.

structured_data.payment_terms: થોડા પૈસા આજે આપવા અને બાકીના પછી આપવા
special_conditions: કામમાં મોડું થાય તો પછી વાત કરવી

5b1642a0-2176-4b6d-a2da-9788c0e7b76b.agreement:
# AGREEMENT FOR SHOP RENOVATION

This Agreement is made and entered into on this day in Vadodara.

### 1. PARTIES
**Party 1:** Rohan
**Party 2:** Jay

### 2. RECITALS
The purpose of this agreement is to facilitate the renovation of a shop located in Vadodara. Both parties have agreed to the terms and conditions set forth below to ensure the completion of the renovation work.

### 3. TERMS OF PAYMENT
*   **Total Amount:** 50,000 (Fifty Thousand)
*   **Payment Terms:** A portion of the payment shall be made today, and the remaining balance shall be paid subsequently.

### 4. DURATION & VALIDITY
*   **Duration:** [Not Specified]

### 5. COVENANTS & RESPONSIBILITIES
*   **Responsibilities of Party 1 (Rohan):** Responsible for making the payments as agreed.
*   **Responsibilities of Party 2 (Jay):** Responsible for executing the shop renovation work.

### 6. SPECIAL CONDITIONS & PENALTIES
*   The work must be completed expeditiously.
*   In the event of any delay in the completion of the work, the parties shall discuss the matter further to reach a resolution.

### 7. WITNESSES
*   [Not Specified]

### 8. SIGNATURES

**Party 1 (Rohan):** __________________________
Date: ________________

**Party 2 (Jay):** __________________________
Date: ________________

**Witness 1:** __________________________

**Witness 2:** __________________________

bbc0d1b7-7ccb-4604-ac66-b4013739f8be.transcript:
सौरभ: नमस्कार प्रिया, आपण घराच्या इंटिरियरच्या कामाबद्दल बोललो होतो ना?
प्रिया: हो, मला आठवतंय. मी संपूर्ण हॉल आणि किचनचं इंटिरियर करून देईन.
सौरभ: छान. या कामासाठी एकूण खर्च किती येईल?
प्रिया: एकूण खर्च ₹२,२५,००० असेल.
सौरभ: ठीक आहे. मी आज ₹७५,००० अॅडव्हान्स देतो आणि उरलेले ₹१,५०,००० काम पूर्ण झाल्यावर देईन.
प्रिया: मला मान्य आहे.
सौरभ: काम पूर्ण करायला किती वेळ लागेल?
प्रिया: जास्तीत जास्त ४५ दिवसांत काम पूर्ण करून देईन.
सौरभ: जर उशीर झाला तर?
प्रिया: जर माझ्याकडून उशीर झाला तर प्रत्येक अतिरिक्त दिवसासाठी ₹१,००० दंड स्वीकारेन.
सौरभ: आणि काम पूर्ण झाल्यानंतर काही हमी असेल का?
प्रिया: हो, मी ६ महिन्यांची मोफत सर्व्हिस आणि किरकोळ दुरुस्तीची सुविधा देईन.
सौरभ: जर मला काही कारणामुळे काम अर्धवट रद्द करावं लागलं तर?
प्रिया: काम सुरू झाल्यानंतर प्रकल्प रद्द केल्यास दिलेला अॅडव्हान्स परत मिळणार नाही.
सौरभ: ठीक आहे.
प्रिया: माझं पूर्ण नाव प्रिया देशमुख आहे आणि माझा मोबाईल नंबर ९८७६५४३२१० आहे.
सौरभ: माझं पूर्ण नाव सौरभ कुलकर्णी आहे आणि माझा मोबाईल नंबर ९१२३४५६७८९ आहे.
प्रिया: आपण दोघेही या अटींना पूर्णपणे सहमत आहोत.
सौरभ: हो, मी या करारातील सर्व अटी मान्य करतो.

structured_data.payment_terms: ₹७५,००० अॅडव्हान्स आणि उरलेले ₹१,५०,००० काम पूर्ण झाल्यावर

६ महिन्यांची मोफत सर्व्हिस आणि किरकोळ दुरुस्तीची सुविधा देणे

special_conditions: उशीर झाल्यास प्रत्येक अतिरिक्त दिवसासाठी ₹१,००० दंड
काम सुरू झाल्यानंतर प्रकल्प रद्द केल्यास अॅडव्हान्स परत मिळणार नाही

bbc0d1b7-7ccb-4604-ac66-b4013739f8be.agreement:
# INTERIOR DESIGN AND EXECUTION AGREEMENT

This Agreement is made and entered into on this day by and between:

**Party 1:** Saurabh Kulkarni (hereinafter referred to as the "Client")

**AND**

**Party 2:** Priya Deshmukh (hereinafter referred to as the "Contractor")

### 1. PURPOSE OF AGREEMENT
The Client hereby engages the Contractor to perform interior design and execution work for the Hall and Kitchen (the "Project").

### 2. TERMS OF PAYMENT
The total consideration for the Project is ₹2,25,000 (Two Lakh Twenty-Five Thousand Rupees only), payable as follows:
*   **Advance Payment:** ₹75,000 (Seventy-Five Thousand Rupees) to be paid by the Client.
*   **Final Payment:** ₹1,50,000 (One Lakh Fifty Thousand Rupees) to be paid by the Client upon successful completion of the work.

### 3. DURATION AND VALIDITY
The Project shall be completed within a duration of 45 days from the commencement date.

### 4. COVENANTS AND RESPONSIBILITIES
**Responsibilities of Party 1 (Client):**
*   To provide the advance payment as stipulated.
*   To provide the remaining balance payment upon completion of the work.

**Responsibilities of Party 2 (Contractor):**
*   To execute the complete interior work for the Hall and Kitchen.
*   To provide 6 months of free service and minor repair facilities post-completion.

### 5. SPECIAL CONDITIONS AND PENALTIES
*   **Delay Penalty:** In the event of a delay in completion, a penalty of ₹1,000 per day shall be charged for each additional day.
*   **Cancellation Policy:** If the project is cancelled after the commencement of work, the advance payment shall not be refunded.

### 6. LOCATION
[Not Specified]

### 7. WITNESSES
[Not Specified]

---

### SIGNATURES

**Party 1 (Client):** __________________________
Name: Saurabh Kulkarni

**Party 2 (Contractor):** __________________________
Name: Priya Deshmukh

**Witness 1:** __________________________

**Witness 2:** __________________________

6d6bf1e1-f4c3-4214-9fd0-d9e462d0fbc3.agreement:
# INTERIOR DESIGN AGREEMENT

**THIS AGREEMENT** is made and entered into at **MUMBAI** on this [Date] day of [Month], [Year].

### BETWEEN

**SAURABH KULKARNI (सौरभ कुलकर्णी)**, hereinafter referred to as the "Party 1" (Client);

**AND**

**PRIYA DESHMUKH (प्रिया देशमुख)**, hereinafter referred to as the "Party 2" (Contractor).

### 1. RECITALS / PURPOSE
The purpose of this Agreement is to define the terms and conditions for the interior design and execution work of the Hall and Kitchen at the specified location in Mumbai.

### 2. TERMS OF PAYMENT
The total consideration for the project is **₹2,25,000 (Two Lakh Twenty-Five Thousand Rupees)**. The payment shall be made as follows:
*   **Advance Payment:** ₹75,000 (Seventy-Five Thousand Rupees).
*   **Final Payment:** ₹1,50,000 (One Lakh Fifty Thousand Rupees) payable upon completion of the work.

### 3. DURATION & VALIDITY
The duration for the completion of the project is **45 days** from the commencement date.

### 4. COVENANTS & RESPONSIBILITIES
**Responsibilities of Party 1:**
*   To provide the advance payment as stipulated.
*   To provide the remaining balance payment upon successful completion of the work.

**Responsibilities of Party 2:**
*   To complete the interior work of the entire Hall and Kitchen.
*   To provide 6 months of free service and minor repair facilities.

### 5. SPECIAL CONDITIONS & PENALTIES
*   **Delay Penalty:** In the event of a delay, a penalty of ₹1,000 per additional day shall be levied.
*   **Cancellation:** If the project is cancelled after the commencement of work, the advance payment shall not be refunded.

### 6. WITNESSES
[Not Specified]

### 7. SIGNATURES

**Party 1 (Client):** __________________________
(Saurabh Kulkarni / सौरभ कुलकर्णी)

**Party 2 (Contractor):** __________________________
(Priya Deshmukh / प्रिया देशमुख)

**Witness 1:** __________________________

**Witness 2:** __________________________

33c4092b-561c-4651-8c5b-5edc4582cafc.agreement:
# करारनामा
भाडेकरार / करारनामा नहीं है, यह एक सेवा करारनामा है जो दो पक्षों के बीच हस्ताक्षरित किया जा रहा है।

## प्रस्तावना
यह करारनामा दिनांक [Not Specified] को हस्ताक्षरित किया जा रहा है, जिसमें प्रथम पक्ष राहुल और द्वितीय पक्ष अमित हैं।

## पक्ष
- प्रथम पक्ष: राहुल
- द्वितीय पक्ष: अमित

## उद्देश्य
यह करारनामा ई-कॉमर्स वेबसाइट बनाने के उद्देश्य से किया जा रहा है, जिसमें दोनों पक्षों के बीच सेवा प्रदान करने और सेवा ग्रहण करने की शर्तें निर्धारित की जा रही हैं।

## भुगतान की शर्तें
भुगतान की राशि ₹50,000 है, जिसमें ₹20,000 एडवांस और ₹30,000 काम पूरा होने पर दिया जाएगा।

## अवधि और वैधता
यह करारनामा 30 दिनों की अवधि के लिए वैध होगा, जो दोनों पक्षों के बीच सहमति से बढ़ाई जा सकती है।

## कर्तव्य और जिम्मेदारियां
- प्रथम पक्ष की जिम्मेदारियां: [Not Specified]
- द्वितीय पक्ष की जिम्मेदारियां: [Not Specified]

## विशेष शर्तें और दंड
विशेष शर्तें और दंड: [Not Specified]

## गवाह
गवाह: [Not Specified]

## हस्ताक्षर
यह करारनामा दोनों पक्षों द्वारा हस्ताक्षरित किया जा रहा है, जो इसकी शर्तों को स्वीकार करते हैं और उनका पालन करने के लिए सहमत हैं।
___________
प्रथम पक्ष: राहुल
___________
द्वितीय पक्ष: अमित
___________
गवाह: [Not Specified]

d8c4d2b2-7732-453f-b431-42cc97fb2494.agreement:
# AGREEMENT OF SERVICE
THIS AGREEMENT OF SERVICE ("Agreement") is made and entered into on the date of execution by and between the parties below.

## Preamble
The parties agree to execute this Agreement as of the date of signing, with the terms and conditions outlined below.

## Parties
This Agreement is made by and between:
- **Party 1:** राहुल (Rahul)
- **Party 2:** अमित (Amit)

## Recitals / Purpose
WHEREAS, the purpose of this Agreement is for Party 1 and Party 2 to collaborate on the development of an ई-कॉमर्स वेबसाइट (e-commerce website), with the specific terms and conditions as outlined below.

## Terms of Payment
The payment terms for this Agreement are as follows:
- An advance payment of ₹20,000 to be made by Party 2 to Party 1.
- A final payment of ₹30,000 to be made by Party 2 to Party 1 upon completion of the work.

## Duration & Validity
The duration of this Agreement shall be 30 दिन (30 days) from the date of execution.

## Covenants & Responsibilities
The responsibilities of the parties are as follows:
- **Party 1 (राहुल):** Not Specified
- **Party 2 (अमित):** Not Specified

## Special Conditions & Penalties
Any special conditions or penalties have been omitted as they are Not Specified.

## Witnesses
This Agreement has been witnessed by: Not Specified

## Signatures
This Agreement has been executed by the parties as follows:

**Party 1 (राहुल):** _____________________________  
**Party 2 (अमित):** _____________________________  
**Witnesses:** Not Applicable

488a2c3d-1de7-4617-9099-f332b8050a51.transcript:
सौरभ: नमस्कार प्रिया, आपण घराच्या इंटिरियरच्या कामाबद्दल बोललो होतो ना?
प्रिया: हो, मला आठवतंय. मी संपूर्ण हॉल आणि किचनचं इंटिरियर करून देईन.
सौरभ: छान. या कामासाठी एकूण खर्च किती येईल?
प्रिया: एकूण खर्च ₹२,२५,००० असेल.
सौरभ: ठीक आहे. मी आज ₹७५,००० अॅडव्हान्स देतो आणि उरलेले ₹१,५०,००० काम पूर्ण झाल्यावर देईन.
प्रिया: मला मान्य आहे.
सौरभ: काम पूर्ण करायला किती वेळ लागेल?
प्रिया: जास्तीत जास्त ४५ दिवसांत काम पूर्ण करून देईन.
सौरभ: जर उशीर झाला तर?
प्रिया: जर माझ्याकडून उशीर झाला तर प्रत्येक अतिरिक्त दिवसासाठी ₹१,००० दंड स्वीकारेन.
सौरभ: आणि काम पूर्ण झाल्यानंतर काही हमी असेल का?
प्रिया: हो, मी ६ महिन्यांची मोफत सर्व्हिस आणि किरकोळ दुरुस्तीची सुविधा देईन.
सौरभ: जर मला काही कारणामुळे काम अर्धवट रद्द करावं लागलं तर?
प्रिया: काम सुरू झाल्यानंतर प्रकल्प रद्द केल्यास दिलेला अॅडव्हान्स परत मिळणार नाही.
सौरभ: ठीक आहे.
प्रिया: माझं पूर्ण नाव प्रिया देशमुख आहे आणि माझा मोबाईल नंबर ९८७६५४३२१० आहे.
सौरभ: माझं पूर्ण नाव सौरभ कुलकर्णी आहे आणि माझा मोबाईल नंबर ९१२३४५६७८९ आहे.
प्रिया: आपण दोघेही या अटींना पूर्णपणे सहमत आहोत.
सौरभ: हो, मी या करारातील सर्व अटी मान्य करतो.

structured_data.payment_terms: ₹७५,००० अॅडव्हान्स आणि उरलेले ₹१,५०,००० काम पूर्ण झाल्यावर
special_conditions: ६ महिन्यांची मोफत सर्व्हिस आणि किरकोळ दुरुस्तीची सुविधा
काम सुरू झाल्यानंतर प्रकल्प रद्द केल्यास दिलेला अॅडव्हान्स परत मिळणार नाही

488a2c3d-1de7-4617-9099-f332b8050a51.agreement:
# AGREEMENT OF INTERIOR WORK
## Preamble
This Agreement of Interior Work ("Agreement") is made and entered into on the date of execution by and between सौरभ कुलकर्णी ("Party 1") and प्रिया देशमुख ("Party 2").

## Parties
- **Party 1:** सौरभ कुलकर्णी
- **Party 2:** प्रिया देशमुख

## Recitals / Purpose
WHEREAS, Party 1 and Party 2 have agreed to enter into this Agreement for the purpose of घराच्या इंटिरियरच्या कामाबद्दल (interior work of the house); and
WHEREAS, the parties wish to outline the terms and conditions of their agreement.

## Terms of Payment
The total payment for the interior work shall be ₹२,२५,०००. The payment terms are as follows:
- ₹७५,००० to be paid in advance.
- The remaining ₹१,५०,००० to be paid upon completion of the work.

## Duration & Validity
The duration of this Agreement shall be ४५ दिवस (45 days) from the commencement of the work.

## Covenants & Responsibilities
The responsibilities of the parties are as follows:
- **Party 1:** [Not Specified]
- **Party 2:** [Not Specified]

## Special Conditions & Penalties
The following special conditions and penalties shall apply:
- A penalty of ₹१,००० for each additional day beyond the agreed duration.
- A ६ महिन्यांची मोफत सर्व्हिस आणि किरकोळ दुरुस्तीची सुविधा (6 months of free service and minor repair facility) shall be provided.
- If the project is cancelled after the work commences, the advance payment made shall not be refundable.

## Witnesses
[Not Specified]

## Signatures
This Agreement has been executed by the parties as of the date first above written.

**Party 1 (सौरभ कुलकर्णी):** _____________________________  
**Party 2 (प्रिया देशमुख):** _____________________________  
**Witnesses:** [Not Specified]

8fa06bb6-8c50-4fb9-8e40-94aa9a043618.transcript: सौरभ कुलकर्णी (मालक) आणि प्रिया देशमुख (भाडेकरू) यांच्यात घराच्या इंटीरियरच्या कामाबद्दल २५,००० रुपये ॲडव्हान्स आणि उरलेले १,५०,००० काम पूर्ण झाल्यावर ४५ दिवसांत पूर्ण करण्याचे ठरले.

structured_data.payment_terms: २५,००० रुपये ॲडव्हान्स आणि उरलेले १,५०,००० काम पूर्ण झाल्यावर

# AGREEMENT OF HOUSE INTERIOR WORK
## Preamble
This Agreement of House Interior Work ("Agreement") is made and entered into on [Not Specified] ("Effective Date") by and between Saurabh Kulkarni ("Party 1") and Priya Deshmukh ("Party 2").

## Parties
Party 1: Saurabh Kulkarni  
Party 2: Priya Deshmukh

## Recitals / Purpose
WHEREAS, Party 1 and Party 2 have agreed to enter into this Agreement for the purpose of House Interior Work; and  
WHEREAS, the parties wish to outline the terms and conditions of their agreement.

## Terms of Payment
The payment amount for the House Interior Work shall be 1,75,000 Rupees. The payment terms are as follows: 25,000 Rupees advance and the remaining 1,50,000 Rupees upon completion of the work.

## Duration & Validity
The duration of this Agreement shall be 45 days.

## Covenants & Responsibilities
The responsibilities of the parties are as follows:  
Party 1: [Not Specified]  
Party 2: [Not Specified]

## Special Conditions & Penalties
[Not Specified]

## Witnesses
[Not Specified]

## Signatures
___________  
Saurabh Kulkarni (Party 1)  
___________  
Priya Deshmukh (Party 2)

# AGREEMENT OF HOUSE INTERIOR WORK
## Preamble
This Agreement of House Interior Work is made and entered into on the date of execution by and between the parties whose details are specified below.

## Parties
- **Party 1:** Saurabh Kulkarni
- **Party 2:** Priya Deshmukh

## Recitals / Purpose
This Agreement is made with the purpose of outlining the terms and conditions for the house interior work to be undertaken by Party 1 for Party 2.

## Terms of Payment
The total payment for the house interior work shall be ₹2,25,000. The payment terms are as follows: ₹75,000 as an advance and the remaining ₹1,50,000 to be paid upon completion of the work.

## Duration & Validity
The duration of this Agreement shall be 45 days from the commencement of the work.

## Covenants & Responsibilities
- **Party 1 Responsibilities:** Not Specified
- **Party 2 Responsibilities:** Not Specified

## Special Conditions & Penalties
The following special conditions and penalties shall apply:
- A penalty of ₹1,000 for each additional day beyond the agreed duration.
- A 6-month free service and minor repair facility.
- In the event the project is cancelled after commencement, the advance paid shall not be refundable.

## Witnesses
Not Specified

## Signatures
### Party 1 (Saurabh Kulkarni)
___________________________
### Party 2 (Priya Deshmukh)
___________________________
### Witnesses
___________________________
